name: sciple-mcp
description: Populate and manage Sciple platform content from Claude — environments, services, dashboards, runbooks, projects, tickets.
long_description: MCP server for the Sciple Internal Developer Platform. Lets Claude bootstrap tenant structure, maintain the service catalogue, build observability dashboards, author runbooks, and manage projects + tickets without leaving the chat. Stdio mode — what this Desktop Extension runs — authenticates with a Sciple personal access token (PAT) minted from Profile → Access tokens in your Sciple dashboard.

api_url.title: Sciple API URL
api_url.description: Base URL of your Sciple platform REST API, including the /api/v1 prefix. Example: http://localhost:8000/api/v1

api_token.title: Sciple Personal Access Token
api_token.description: Mint a token under Profile → Access tokens in your Sciple dashboard. Scopes govern which tools succeed; out-of-scope calls return 403.

tenant_id.title: Sciple Tenant ID
tenant_id.description: Short id of your Sciple tenant (e.g. Oejcdo). Must equal the token's bound tenant.
